use_cases: Landing page hero section with call-to-action button
Marketing page with product showcase and conversion goal
Full-width hero banner with gradient background and animated elements
Hero section for SaaS or subscription-based product landing pages
Mobile-responsive hero with prominent CTA placement
ai_summary: A marketing hero component designed for landing pages, featuring a gradient or minimalist visual style with a prominent call-to-action button. Includes hover interactions and likely scroll animations for engagement. Built with Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS for accessibility and modern styling. Suitable for SaaS, e-commerce, and media landing pages across desktop and mobile platforms.
